entries.reason: The release E2E localization scanner currently finds a large backlog of SwiftUI user-facing literals that are not registered in Localizable.xcstrings. The catalog has complete per-locale values for registered keys and generated resources are still enforced.
entries.repair: Register the remaining macOS UI literals in Localizable.xcstrings in product-owned batches, deduplicate repeated labels, preserve source English, provide reviewed translations for de/es/fr/it/ja/ko/pt-BR/ru/zh-Hans, then remove this quarantine.
